description: PR-mined: real upstream range v3.1.0..v3.1.1 (privacy-friendly-pedometer). Adds accessibility contentDescriptions to the widget's pause/continue/start-training ImageButtons (new a11y_* strings + the AppTheme secusoLogoDrawable wiring, both real, not authored), plus a real code change: AbstractStepDetectorService gains a getmStepDetectorBinder() getter and AccelerometerStepDetectorService starts tracking a static self-reference. 'add' in editClass: new string names (a11y_*) AND two new drawable names (secuso_logo_black/white) both need R regen.
